name: Tuna Kebabs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon light olive oil with a dash of toasted sesame oil
1 pound fresh tuna cut into 20 (1-inch) pieces
3 tablespoons chopped cilantro or parsley for garnish
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the broiler or compression grill for 10 minutes.
For the sauce: Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Fry the garlic and ginger for 2 minutes to release flavorful oils. Add 1/4 cup of wine, tamari, brown sugar, and Shanghai Spice Mix. Remove from heat and add peanut butter, stirring until smooth. Set aside and keep warm.
For the tuna kebabs: String 5 tuna pieces and 4 artichoke halves alternately on each bamboo skewer, starting and ending with tuna. Brush the kebabs with the sauce. Broil the kebabs for 3 minutes on each side or until the tuna is white throughout. Thin the remaining sauce by adding more wine to achieve a pouring consistency.
Serve kebabs garnished with chopped cilantro or parsley on top.
Yield: 4 servings
Note: To make Shanghai Spice Mix:
7 tablespoons crushed red pepper flakes
2 3/4 teaspoons ground ginger
2 3/4 teaspoons ground anise
Grind to a fine powder.
